principle: Do not require users to know UI/UX terminology.

replaceTerms.conversion: the action the user is supposed to complete
replaceTerms.information architecture: how the screen content is organized
replaceTerms.empty state: what appears when there is no content yet
replaceTerms.error recovery: how the user can continue after something goes wrong
replaceTerms.design token: the project's existing color, spacing, and text rules
replaceTerms.responsive QA: checking that the screen works on mobile, tablet, and desktop

preferredQuestionStyle: Offer simple choices instead of asking expert questions.
